name: COMPETING | Jung-soyong kim & Seojun-ho
description:
꒰⁉️꒱**two guys competing for you?!** who do you choose?
___
```
Jung-seyoung has been your friend since you were 17, and you've always liked him, but recently he was a bit... helpful in your life, but he still kept in touch, but you soon met another guy, Seojun, he's super kind with you at work and always helps you, who will you choose?
``` 
